programme.desc: The girls get a shock when Benzie launches a sneak attack on an unsuspecting target.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Chicago
programme.desc: A look at who is Chicago-bound.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Chicago
programme.desc: Seven new Bad Girls take the Windy City by storm, but one feisty roommate's sloppy antics may cause the first day in the house to be her last.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: He's no stranger to unkempt bars, but Jon is absolutely disgusted by the rat, roach, and raccoon problem inside Freaki Tiki.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the failing owner of Baseline Sports Bar, whose sexually exploitive spaghetti wrestling events have driven away female customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help the owner of George & Dragon come to terms with his mother's death before he drinks away all his profits and the family legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After convincing his friends to invest their life savings, the rookie bar owner of Cirivello's has turned a community staple into a money pit and now faces a hostile takeover.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has a hard time getting through to the owner of the Black Light District, who's convinced fixing up his rancid dive would be a betrayal of his punk rock credo.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of City Bar compounded his troubles when he approved a poorly received fetish night, so Jon must help him come up with a new plan to whip up business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon needs the nice-guy owner of Champagne's Cafe, a classic Vegas dive with a storied Mafia history, to start acting like a wise guy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When a military veteran/bar owner responds to criticism of his philanthropic work with nasty comments online, his business is sent into a tailspin.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A roller rink bar in a tiny desert town is in danger of closing for good if Jon can't get the hometown hero who owns it to take control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon's attempt to save the YNot Sports Pub & Grub gets off to a bad start when there isn't enough staff on hand for a stress test.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Tradewinds bar could shut down for good if Jon can't get a lazy stepson to step into his new role as manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Rescuing the Russell City Grill & Sports Bar was already going to be a challenge, but a violent brawl makes Jon question if it's even worth saving.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Brother and sister owners develop a bitter sibling rivalry when they take over the historic Sam Jordan's bar in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon wants to save the mice-infested, touristy Fort One Bar & Lounge, he'll need to get the spoiled owner who was gifted the bar to stop taking it for granted.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April suffers PTSD after losing a rescue victim. Mitch and the victim's widow refused to give up searching for his body. Jessie runs into an old beau who could undermine her future at Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie struggles with his irresponsible actions leading to a boating accident that leaves a girl in a coma. Jessie is gripped with fear after April tells her of a recent, job-related tragedy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch befriends a boy who joins junior lifeguards in hopes of escaping a brutal home life. Jessie makes a passionate play for JD. Alex auditions for “Jeopardy!”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Upset about his failed marriage to Neely, Mitch goes for a day-long tower swim along the beach and encounters problems that distract from his own, including April and Craig's May/December romance, and reluctant heroes Cody and JD.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A young, hearing-impaired girl learns a lesson in friendship when she, Mitch and Alex protect an orangutan, while Cody and Jessie deal with its abusive owner.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody puts his career, and his life, on the line when he uses a performance-enhancing supplement in hopes of making the Olympic swim team. Alex becomes the object of Mitch's rejection, and Newmie's affection.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch tries to reunite an Army parachutist with her estranged Naval-officer father, while Cody helps a beautiful woman try to reach record-setting depths at a national free-diving competition.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After he tries to save Tanner from his abusive father, Mitch ends up on the wrong side of the law. Meanwhile, Jessie's irresistible charm makes a stunt pilot's heart take flight.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When caught up in a high-risk adventure at sea, Craig tells Mitch a shocking secret. Meanwhile, Jessie works to creatively end JD and Cody's rivalry during a beachside triathlon, and April comes clean with Manny.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch feels the need for speed when Tanner's cousin, Damon Lusk, a race car driver in town for a major competition, visits Baywatch. Meanwhile, Newmie and the gang develop a TV show about lifeguards that they try to sell it into syndication.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch's lifeguard buddy's ex-wife dies in Australia, Mitch and the team accompany him on a trip down under to meet the son he's never known.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While team Baywatch prepares to compete against the Australian guards, Jake must choose between staying down under with his son or returning home. The competing lifeguards must put their intense rivalry aside to save a life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody learns a lesson in love when he and Mitch help a troubled violinist escape her dangerously overbearing mentor with a secret agenda. Meanwhile, Alex sets out to prove her worth at Baywatch by retaking the grueling rookie test with Jessie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Alex tries to save a diamond smuggler whose partners want him to "sleep with the fishes." Neely makes Hobie a tempting offer that divides the Buchannon household.

programme.title: Bellator 158: Lima v Daley
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades England as Paul Daley and Douglas Lima meet in a long-awaited showdown between welterweight knockout artists. And don’t miss Michael “MVP” Page as he looks to go viral against Cyborg Santos. Plus Matt Mitrione and James Gallagher!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Memphis as former middleweight champion Alexander Shlemenko takes on Kendall “Da Spyda” Grove. And WWE superstar Bobby Lashley looks to continue his winning ways against Josh Appelt in a battle of hard-hitting heavyweights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA goes global as it emanates from Tel Aviv, Israel for a highly anticipated rematch between Andrey Koreshkov and Douglas Lima for the welterweight title in whats sure to be an action-packed main-event between two of the best in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the SAP Center in San Jose with a long awaited lightweight title showdown between champ Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson, and another pair of hard-hitting lightweights collide as Brandon Girtz faces off with Adam Piccolotti.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Thackerville, OK with a rematch at Bantamweight as Darrion 'The Wolf' Caldwell seeks revenge on Joe Taimanglo who perviously submitting Caldwell for his first professional loss.

programme.title: Bellator 168: Sakara vs Beltran
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Florence, Italy as Melvin Manhoef takes on middleweight world champion Rafael Carvalho in a rematch with the belt on the line. Also, Joey Beltran takes on Alessio Sakara, along with appearances by Ed Ruth and John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes over the SAP Center in San Jose with a highly anticipated light-weight showdown between Josh “The Punk” Thomson and Patricky Pitbull. Also, heavyweight knockout artist Cheick Kongo takes on former training partner Oli Thomson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Belfast, Ireland with former Light Heavyweight Champ Liam McGeary facing off against Brett McDermott. Plus rising Irish star James Gallagher!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is live from Thackerville, Oklahoma as MMA trailblazer Maloes Coenen meets standout Julia Budd for the inaugural 145-pound Women’s World Championship!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Rampage Jackson and King Mo go to battle in a highly anticipated rematch nearly three years in the making from the Allstate Arena in Illinois. And feared Russian heavyweight knockout artist Sergei Kharitonov returns to the cage.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Torino with exciting action featuring Melvin Manhoef vs Rafael Carvalho for the Middleweight World Title as well as Djamal Chan vs Valeriu Mircea. Also on the card breakout women’s star Anastasia Yankova.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil examines the case of missing mother of two, Susan Powell. Her husband, Josh Powell, is now a person of interest, and Susan's parents, Charles and Judy Cox, are looking for answers. Go behind the headlines of this heartbreaking story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil unfolds an incredible story of Loretta,brutally raped at age 15, Dean, the man accused, the power of DNA, innocence, exoneration, and forgiveness. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What's a woman to do when her spouse is constantly standing over her shoulder and nitpicking everything she does.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Don't miss Dr. Phil receiving his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame! Plus, time is of the essence for mom Cindy. Daughter Cheyenne, 24, is a college student, Cindy's caretaker & sole financial supporter. Boyfriend, Blake, calls Cheyenne 'Cinderella'.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kristen says two years ago she was manipulated into placing her newborn for adoption with her ex-stepfather Adam and his new wife, Stacy, who Kristen says promised she could remain in the child's life. Adam & Stacy insist they did everything by the book.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil spoke with Karen & Jim desperate to remove their mooching son from their home. Kyle revealed why his parents were at fault for his financial situation. Dr. Phil enlists the help of TVs "Bar Rescue", Jon Taffer, with advice for Kyle. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ivey, 21, admits the only "job" she's ever had has been working as an escort meeting clients in hotels until she can afford a stable home for her & her young son. Mom Faith found out & threw her out of the home. Friend Olivia goes between mom & daughter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's guests engage in a heated debate about the rights of men and women when a child is conceived out of wedlock. Should the biological father be forced to pay child support for a child he didn't know existed or did not plan?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Baylen bravely posted TikTok videos of her daily struggles with Tourette syndrome and now has over 3 million followers. Singer/Influencer Lele Pons says she also suffers from OCD, Tourette syndrome, & depression. They discuss their experiences.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shaela went from being a mom to two with a master's degree working as a school counselor to being unemployed & living in an RV. Mom Sandra says Shaela has exhibited strange behaviors, including trimming bushes & pulling weeds in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jason & Shady have a blended family on the verge of falling apart. After knowing each other 2 months & meeting in person 1 time, they married. Each brought children into their new home & with seven kids under one roof, life isn't what anyone expected.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: There have been no answers to the whereabouts of Summer Wells, 5, missing since 2021. Parents Don & Candus say it backfired by requesting the public's help. In this exclusive first national TV interview, Dr. Phil digs deeper into the story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Continuing with Danielle & Brandon, who are involved in a custody battle. Accusations involving the Sheriff over a sports drink & CPS sent to a wedding rehearsal dinner--Dr. Phil tells the parents how to create a peaceful environment for their child.Pt.2

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly ladies move out of the Clampett mansion but Jed and Jethro replace them with a trio of Japanese beauties.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly women, assured of their equal rights, return to the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May gets a job at Mr. Drysdale's bank and moves into co-worker Jane Hathaway's apartment.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A fortune-hunting young man decides to amrry into the hillbilly family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jane Hathaway learns her new boyfriend is a fortune-hunter who would like to marry Elly May and her family's millions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett is told by a representative of an oil company that the swamp behind his shack is full of oil.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts begin to settle in their new home in Beverly Hills, California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: While Granny boils pool water for washing due to the "lack of a pump" and Elly May gets a feminine make-over by Miss Hathaway, cousin Pearl is back at the cabin making eyes with the visiting oil man while he gives her a ride to the nearest phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early because she'll meet the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to go home because folks are so unfriendly no one has come to call.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Ellie May, Jethro, and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts pack up to return to Beverly Hills, so Jethrine tries to pack Jazzbo Depew. Elly says goodbye to her animals

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of the cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdale's dog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampett's before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E002) Brandon's new girlfriend has intimacy issues and Brenda has trouble at school.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E003) Brenda arrives back in Beverly Hills in the middle of the night and Steve's scheming ways almost backfire as the gang decides which classes to take.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E004) It is rush week on campus. Now on the staff of the campus radio station, David and Donna man the graveyard shift.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E005) Dylan finds Kelly with another guy. Donna is offered a daytime slot at the radio station, which causes problems with David. Andrea plans a date with her English teacher.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E006) Kelly recommends that she and Dylan see other people. Mr. Walsh sets Brenda up on a blind date with his client's son.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E007) Andrea takes initiative in her relationship with Dan. David and Kelly take sides in a fight between their parents.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E009) Brenda and Stuart argue about the details of their marriage. Lucinda has unsettling news for Brandon.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E010) The gang follows Brenda and Stuart to Las Vegas in hopes of stopping the wedding.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E011) Laura threatens to label Steve as a date rapist at a campus rally. He loses Celeste when he confesses his indiscretion.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E012) Brandon takes an unexpected road trip and Dylan accepts a Thanksgiving dinner invitation at the Walsh's after declining an invitation from Kelly.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E013) Brandon encourages Emily to pursue her dreams and Steve is caught stealing.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E014) Donna and David celebrate their first year together. Dylan and Kelly get back together, while Andrea falls in love with a new boyfriend.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E015) The Walshes trip to Hawai'i doesn't go as planned when their plane is turned around due to technical problems.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin, who inherited a struggling barbershop, views the shop as nothing but a burden and a waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Barbershop is threatened by the arrival of a hip, well-financed chain barbershop that's about to open next door.

programme.title: Boyz n the Hood
programme.desc: Three friends struggle to survive in South Central Los Angeles where friendship, pain, danger, and love form a true picture of life in the 'hood in this critically acclaimed, action-filled story.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Paid in Full
programme.desc: A young man from Harlem, forced to cope with the 1980s drug scene, builds an illegal empire, only to have a crisis of conscience. Featuring the hit soundtrack with songs by Eric B. & Rakim, Boogie Down Productions, Guy, and Jay-Z.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old schoolfriend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: To impress a politically minded girlfriend, Lamont sounds off about community problems on a local radio show and is subsequently talked into running for state assemblyman.

programme.title: Sanford and Son

programme.title: The Jeffersons

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Louise's donation to charity might win her a special award, if George's 'donation' to a politician doesn't ruin her chances.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Tom Willis' latest business trip may be his last if Helen finds out who he is traveling with and what kind of 'business' they have in mind.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George gets caught between his morals and his money when his efforts to increase his take on a business deal turn him into an unlikely neighborhood hero.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The first casualty from George and Louise's vicious verbal battle could be the interviewer interested in their 'perfect marriage.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: An evening out at the disco turns into 'every night fever' when George stretches a good thing a bit too far. Louise's frustration grows when she realizes that she is to blame.

When Pearl (Helen Martin) is refused her social security check because the computer lists her as deceased, Mary (Marla Gibbs), Rose (Alaina Reed) and Sandra (Jackée), join in the battle against bureaucracy, only to land themselves in jail.
Sandra writes a steamy romance novel based on characters that are suspiciously similar to her friends at 227.
Mary's new job with a travel agency takes her out-of-town on business with her boss, leaving a jealous Lester at home. Special guest appearance by Garrett Morris.
Mary takes a stand against the deadly drug, crack when she discovers that a wealthy and generous new friend of Calvin and Brenda is selling the drug.

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Mama Bae is finally back in New York. Tatti hosts a male-free event at the shop while the guys take Bux out on the town. Ted invites the crew to a private screening of his movie premiere and reveals some shocking news.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: With Ceaser and the bosses in Milwaukee for Ted's grand opening, the Brooklyn crew plays hooky with an unexpected guest. Ceaser deals with a crisis in Atlanta that has the whole crew scrambling while Rok and Krystal go MIA.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: As the artists keep the Atlanta shop running, Rok and Krystal's late arrival puts them in Ceaser's crosshairs. Tatti proposes a new role for her future at Black Ink, while Bae wonders how her friends will receive her new boyfriend.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: For one day only, all three cities- NY, Chicago, and Compton come together on one stage to compete for the title of Black Ink's Tattoo Titan.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the season premiere, the crew celebrates 10 years of Black Ink. The first ever Black Ink graduation ceremony goes left when Ceaser realizes that not everyone deserves to be head of the class.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After Ceaser's talk with Ted and Puma, it's time for him to take on the other problem child. While Puma continues to handle things at home, Quani tries to find her independence and herself.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Spyder worries that his first pop-up shop will be a flop as Tatti looks to Krystal and Bae for advice on a special assignment. The Black Ink Bosses finally reunite after their heated confrontation.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser makes a public announcement about changes at the shop that could have a chilling effect on Rok and Krystal. Tatti gets a cold lesson in humility from Bae while deciding to take some personal matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Change is in the air at Black Ink as Ceaser introduces some new blood to the crew. Rok and Krystal consider their future at Black Ink as Bux opens up to bring awareness to others with his lifelong battle.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser is forced to make a hard decision about 125th. Bux gets an unexpected visit at the shop that rocks his world and his friendship. Alex holds auditions for his OnlyFans and is blown away by their talents.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when the 125th artists merge with the Brooklyn shop. A startling revelation about Rok causes Ted and Puma to panic. Bux makes the situation with Spyder worse. Ceaser announces an out-of-town trip and Tatti goes MIA.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew heads to Orlando for Black Ink boot camp where Ceaser is ready to see who is really there for Black Ink. Everyone gets put to the test as tensions arise when Bux and Spyder air their unfinished business at dinner.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew is left in disarray after the bar fight. Ceaser and the bosses wonder what this means for the future of Black Ink, while Rok and Krystal's plans to open a Black Ink New Jersey come to a screeching halt.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: While Ted and Puma address the fallout from Orlando, Tatti starts her new life post Black Ink. Bae attempts to make amends with Krystal as Rok decides whether he's more loyal to Krystal or Black Ink.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper
programme.desc: Robin begins to feel neglected as Mark and Vanessa develop a close friendship.

programme.desc: Mark accepts Trey's (REGGIE McFADDEN) offer to be his roommate in an apartment building filled with beautiful women and wild parties.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Despite Rita's and Janie's warnings to stop, Shelly can't resist having sex (once...maybe twice) with J.T., until she realizes she's starting to act like they are still in a relationship.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Following the advice of a self-help book, Shelly formally asks J.T. in an e-mail to return all her uncollected possessions. J.T. responds that he wants the money he loaned Shelly to be repaid first.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Injuring her knee while exercising, Shelly puts her pride aside and turns to J.T. for physical therapy. A cute doctor in J.T.'s office asks Shelly out, jealous J.T. gives her some unnecessary medical advice to sabotage the date.

programme.desc: Shelly and Rita's competition for the affection of Joe, a charming, handsome bachelor with a yacht, gets out of control, and it's up to Janie to remind the two friends not to fight over a guy.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny's world is rocked when Robert Lewis (Michael Imperioli) in the Attorney General's office obtains new evidence against him in the self-defense shooting case of serial killer Thomas Wilder.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez are determined to get justice for a traumatized young woman who was held hostage, despite her resistance to press charges.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Intent on bringing justice to Lieutenant Gormley after he is beaten by a mob outside his home, Danny and Frank enlist the aid of Detective Anthony Abetemarco, who has a personal connection to the neighborhood where the attack occurred.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate the death of an elderly woman who was shot in her home by a stray bullet. Also, Frank faces ridicule from his department when he disciplines a disrespectful cop, and Erin steps in to help her detective, Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin and Anthony try to prevent the deportation of a prominent community activist, Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), who isn't a citizen, and Frank must decide if the NYPD will participate in the U.S. Marshals' high-profile raid of a local gang.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: As Frank contends with a whistleblower within the NYPD who claims to have evidence of abuse of power in the organization, Danny and Baez investigate the case of a woman who was struck by a car under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank is left with minimal information to find a missing boy when a conflicted priest who could help won't break the seal of confession.

programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un infame traficante de armas, Reymundo Díaz, sale de la cárcel y los cadáveres empiezan a acumularse, Torres se ve obligado a enfrentarse a las repercusiones de sus acciones durante una operación encubierta en la que trabajó hace años.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS investiga una red de adolescentes astutos cuando se produce una serie de robos en la Base de Marines de Quantico. Mientras trabaja en el caso, el agente especial McGee establece un vínculo con una de las adolescentes, Teagan Fields.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga la inesperada muerte de un reservista de la Marina que era periodista de investigación. Además, el romance de Knight y Jimmy queda en suspenso cuando una transferencia de órganos vitales termina fatalmente mal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el final de la temporada 19, el agente Parker es acusado de asesinato, y el equipo pone en juego sus trabajos y sus vidas para ganar tiempo y descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Todo depende del cristal
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una periodista que se niega a revelar su fuente, aunque admite haber cometido un asesinato. Danny se empareja con un adolescente problemático en un programa de la policía para ayudarlo a tomar mejores decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Revancha
programme.desc: Un sospechoso admite haber matado a un chef de un programa de reality show en su restaurante. Danny y Maria creen que está asumiendo la culpa por alguien. Frank enfrenta un dilema moral con su amigo, el senador Ted McCreary.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Nuevas reglas
programme.desc: Cuando alguien cercano a Frank es asesinado, Frank ordena que todos se involucren para atrapar al asesino. Danny y Maria visitan a Mario Hunt, un conocido miembro de una pandilla peligrosa, para trabajar en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El arte de la guerra
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro de la familia Reagan es tiroteado, Danny intenta rastrear al miembro de la pandilla responsable sin dejar que sus emociones lo dominen. También debe ser creativo para atraer a testigos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC es convocado a Wisconsin en busca de un asesino serial, el equipo busca una conexión entre las víctimas para encontrar pistas del sospechoso. Además, Kate tiene dificultades para lidiar con su sobrina, Meg, cuando comienza a comportarse mal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un mes después de que el director Vance fuera secuestrado, a Gibbs se le asigna el papel de director interino en su ausencia mientras el equipo busca su paradero en todo el mundo, en el estreno de la temporada 16.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/23/2023. Eva Longoria visits the state of Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially ‘Mexican’ originated. She also discovers that the state capital, Guadalajara, boasts some of the country’s most cutting-edge restaurants.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/30/2023. Eva Longoria explores the port gateway between Mexico and the rest of the world, Veracruz, and discovers that in its people remains a defiant spirit, still evident in their character, music, and the bold flavors of their food.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/12/2019. Kamau meets members of the Hmong community brought here after the Secret War forced their expulsion from Laos and learns the multi generational stories of loss, perseverance and hope that make up their American journey.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/19/2019. Kamau visits Jackson, MS to explore the divisive world of reproductive rights and reproductive justice including abortion, sex education, and women’s health.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/26/2019. Kamau takes a look at Washington D.C. through the eyes of the city’s residents who show him the vibrant culture of D.C. that is distinct from the Washington politics that surround it.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 6/2/2019. Kamau visits Salt Lake City, Utah, to explore the growing LGBTQ+ community living in the epicenter of the Mormon religion.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 6/9/2019. Kamau visits Milwaukee, WI--the most segregated city in America--to better understand why living while black can be so challenging

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/16/2023. Eva Longoria visits the northeastern state of Nuevo Leon, bordering her home state of Texas. As little grows there, and with meat on every menu, inventive and resourceful chefs transform simple ingredients into culinary delights.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/23/2023. Eva Longoria visits the state of Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially ‘Mexican’ originated. She also discovers that the state capital, Guadalajara, boasts some of the country’s most cutting-edge restaurants.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/30/2023. Eva Longoria explores the port gateway between Mexico and the rest of the world, Veracruz, and discovers that in its people remains a defiant spirit, still evident in their character, music, and the bold flavors of their food.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 6/16/2019. Kamau visits Philadelphia and Chester, Pennsylvania to learn about the toxic man-made disasters that have polluted these communities for generations.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2014. Anthony Bourdain soaks up all Amritsar has to offer. Go with him as he samples savory delicacies at roadside restaurants and experiences a Gurpurab festival.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2014. Anthony Bourdain travels to Las Vegas with food author Michael Ruhlman, where they explore sites including Huntridge Tavern.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/27/2014. Anthony Bourdain accompanies world-renowned chef Daniel Boulud as they travel back to his hometown of Lyon, France.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/04/2014. Anthony Bourdain travels to Mexico City, Oaxaca and Cuernavaca, Mexico, where residents express their passion through food and art.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/04/2015. Bourdain and travel companion chef Eric Ripert visit France’s oldest city to experience its stew of cultures and cuisines.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument. A mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence. A 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home. Prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain. Deputies search for a mysterious driver who fled a car crash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details. A couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie. A chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. Deputies arrest a man for creating an unsafe environment for his younger brother. Mom calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift. A friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Nick investigate street racing after one of the drivers is found dead out in the desert at an abandoned airstrip.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a crime involving a popular actor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a wealthy couple who are found outside their home, which was up for sale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom suspects murder when the body of a dwarf is found hanging from a rope high above a stage in a casino hotel where a convention of little people is being held.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Sara investigate when a woman vanishes while taking part in a magician's act.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Catherine helped put a man on death row for the rape and murder of a coed at a nearby college. The man is about to be executed when he's granted a stay based on new DNA evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A boxing champ dies in the ring after taking a brutal beating from his nemesis, but Grissom finds evidence that points to murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is called in by a pornographic-film developer to view graphic footage from a snuff movie in which a woman is brutally slain.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A cab driver seems to run over a boy and is then beaten to death by a mob for racial reasons.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Nick investigate the case of a man who apparently was murdered and pushed off a six-story building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the grisly meat grinder murder at a slaughterhouse.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Some bird watchers find a raven with a human eyeball in its mouth. Warrick and Grissom look into the circumstances of David's unusual and first autopsy.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick investigates the drive by murder of a young girl in his old neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine takes the point in the investigation of an escalating series of peeping tom incidents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un asesinato lleva al CSI a investigar un psicópata que cumple cadena perpetua. Durante la investigación, Grissom acude a una conferencia del doctor Raymond Langston, un reputado patólogo criminal, para pedirle ayuda en el esclarecimiento del caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se sorprende y entristece cuando, después de trabajar con el Dr. Raymond Langston en los asesinatos de parejas, Grissom anuncia que su tiempo como CSI ha llegado a su fin y le ofrece a Langston un puesto permanente en el equipo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El primer día de trabajo del Dr. Langston va de mal en peor cuando un simple caso de robo rápidamente se superpone con un complicado caso de incendio provocado y homicidio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un agente del FBI que trabajaba encubierto es encontrado brutalmente asesinado, se llama al equipo de CSI para ayudar al compañero de la víctima a encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Nick son llamados para investigar un asesinato en un restaurante de comida rápida y tienen una gran tarea por delante cuando descubren que gran parte de la evidencia está cubierta con aceite de cocina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Langston testifica en el juicio de un respetado congresista, nuevas pruebas envían al equipo de CSI de vuelta al laboratorio para reabrir la investigación.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo acude a tres escenarios de diferentes crímenes en una misma noche. Aparentemente, no están relacionados, pero las pruebas forenses de cada caso revela un vínculo común.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el CSI va a la escena del crimen en un motel familiar, Nick comienza a relacionar tres asesinatos que se han cometido allí ese año.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Riley son tomados como rehenes después de un tiroteo en una comunidad normalmente tranquila de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un antiguo alumno de Ray es asesinado. La investigación les llevará hasta el mundo de la lucha libre mexicana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de Nick sobre un paracaidista herido dará un giro cuando Catherine descubra que está relacionado con un caso de doble asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy se encuentran en una convención de ciencia ficción de uno de sus programas de televisión favoritos, terminan investigando el asesinato de uno de sus queridos actores.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisa uno de los primeros casos en los que trabajó como CSI cuando el delincuente condenado por el asesinato afirma que el veredicto se basó en pruebas defectuosas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una enfermedad inexplicable que afecta a ciudadanos al azar de Las Vegas desconcierta a los CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio is called to the Miami West Detention Center to investigate a murdered inmate, he ends up witnessing three inmates escape.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a young model is killed by a hit and run driver, Horatio investigates the car's owner, who claims he loaned it out to the guests at his party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man harpooned to his yacht leads Horatio into the world of modern-day treasure hunting and the massive greed that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tennis phenom Lana Walker is taken from her bedroom in the night and the only evidence they have to go on is a purple fiber found in the window frame.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a former rape victim is beaten to within inches of her life, Horatio must enter the world of prisons and parolees to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a robbery/homicide leaves two men dead and a third still alive, Horatio is determined to find out what really happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton is trying to drive out of the hurricane's fury when he kills a man in the blinding storm and is now accused of vehicular manslaughter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A gas man is engulfed in invisible flames and dies all of which happens during a qualifying race at the Grand Prix Americas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finally closes the case of his brother's murder. He is reunited with Suzie, a former drug user who was involved with his brother.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a woman is witnessed being attacked by a shark, the CSIs learn that she was murdered prior to being dumped in the water.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young woman is thrown over the railing of a parking garage, the investigation into her death uncovers evidence that she was killed before the fall.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a plastic surgery anesthesiologist is found dead from an apparent suicide, Horatio thinks that this could be a case of murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A diamond broker is shot to death in a parking garage, a mentally disabled man witnessed the murder and wants to help Horatio solve the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man, Juan Marco Varon, who may or may not have tortured Cuban refuges is murdered, the CSIs are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La ex de Horatio, y madre de Kyle, resurge en Miami como la viuda de un multimillonario que hará cualquier cosa para recuperar a su hijo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de una mujer, el equipo de CSI descubre un laboratorio de metanfetamina en su apartamento y a un agente del FBI sin escrúpulos con una vida secreta propia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan un asesinato en una boda, las pistas finalmente llevan a los CSI a un club de striptease local.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El pasado de Horatio vuelve para perseguirlo cuando Julia lo arresta por asesinato. El equipo de CSI debe investigar para absolverlo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio enfrenta fantasmas de su pasado, el equipo corre contra el tiempo para salvar a Calleigh de un grupo de peligrosos secuestradores.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne hace de Hondo Lane, un jinete de caballería que se convierte en el protector de Angie Lowe así como en una figura paterna para su hijo.

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: La quinta y última colaboración entre John Wayne y el director Howard Hawks es un Western lleno de acción recreado despuès de la Guerra Civil, en el que un grupo de hombres busca traidores de la Unión responsables de una serie de ladrones de trenes.

programme.title: Aventura en Río
programme.desc: Alicia sufre amnesia en las calles de Río de Janeiro. Mientras tanto, su esposo, un respetable médico mexicano, la cree muerta. Ella se relaciona con un gánster y acaba trabajando en un cabaré. Pronto, la verdad comenzará a revelarse.

programme.title: Rosauro Castro
programme.desc: García Mata, funcionario del gobierno, viaja a un pequeño pueblo mexicano para investigar el asesinato de Cardozo, candidato a la alcaldía y enemigo del "Cacique" Rosauro Castro, quien gobierna con mano de hierro.

programme.title: El bruto
programme.desc: El dueño de un edificio planea desalojar a sus inquilinos para venderlo. Ante la resistencia de los afectados, y con la ayuda de su amante, contrata a un matón para que se encargue de los desalojos de manera violenta.

programme.title: Al caer la tarde
programme.desc: Un hombre de origen humilde enriquecido a traves del trabajo duro, corteja a la hija de un terrateniente arruinado. Él le propone casamiento y así recuperar su posición económica y social, pero ella lo rechaza.

programme.title: Bordertown
programme.desc: Jennifer Lopez portrays a tenacious American reporter investigating the murders of young women working in a Mexican bordertown.

programme.title: Crisis
programme.desc: El descubrimiento revolucionario de un profesor, una misión encubierta de la DEA contra un cartel y una madre en busca de justicia se entrelazan en un mundo de corrupción, avaricia y dilemas morales dentro de la industria farmacéutica.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Fanático
programme.desc: La obsesión de un hombre con su actor favorito se convierte en locura al no poder conocerlo, borrando la línea entre admiración y delirio en este inquietante retrato de la fama y la obsesión.

programme.title: La prueba
programme.desc: Los ganadores del Óscar Gwyneth Paltrow y Anthony Hopkins protagonizan la historia de una joven atormentada por el pasado de su padre y la sombra de su futuro. Basada en la obra ganadora del Pulitzer, Proof presenta a Jake Gyllenhaal y Hope Davis.

programme.title: Rescate al alba
programme.desc: Durante la guerra de Vietnam, el piloto americano, Dieter Dengler (Christian Bale) es derribado y tomado prisionero por el Vietcong. Durante su cautiverio, le tocó vivir una de las experiencias más notables y horrorosas de toda la guerra.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Adultos jóvenes
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Charlize Theron interpreta a Mavis Gary, la reina del colegio que se convirtió en novelista para adolescentes, y que regresa a casa para recuperar a su novio de la secundaria.

programme.title: Las mujeres perfectas
programme.desc: Después de mudarse con su familia a la comunidad de Stepford, Connecticut, la ex ejecutiva de un canal de televisión en Nueva York, Joanna Eberhart empieza a darse cuenta de que Stepford es demasiado perfecto.

programme.title: La importancia de llamarse Earnest
programme.desc: De la divertidísima aventura de Oscar Wilde se desprende esta historia de dos apuestos y jóvenes solteros y las inauditas decepciones que sufren por amor, protagonizada por Reese Witherspoon, Colin Firth y Rupert Everett.

programme.title: Cuernito Armani
programme.desc: La vida de un capo se complica cuando debe cumplir el deseo de su padre agonizante, se trata de presentarle a su novia pero él no la tiene. Tendrá que buscarla sin imaginar que la vida le tiene una grata sorpresa.

programme.title: ¿Quién Manda?
programme.desc: Una pareja no comprometida que solo busca diversión. Ellos entran en una batalla de egos mientras se enamoran.

programme.title: Mansfield Park
programme.desc: Cuando una enérgica joven es enviada a vivir a la gran finca de sus primos ricos para aprender modales sofisticados, ella les enseña su ingenio. Basada en la amada novela de comedia romántica de Jane Austen.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: Cuando el reino maya está al borde del colapso, un joven se embarca en un peligroso viaje hacia un mundo dominado por el miedo y la opresión.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: Shaft
programme.desc: Para detener a un asesino racista, Shaft tiene que rastrear al único testigo que puede dejarlo tras las rejas. Shaft se acerca a la par del peligro.

programme.title: La agencia de la humanidad
programme.desc: Un thriller distópico ambientado en el año 2030 que ve al mundo en un estado permanente de recesión económica y enfrenta serios problemas ambientales como resultado del calentamiento global.

programme.title: En territorio enemigo
programme.desc: El nuevo agregado militar, segundo al mando en la embajada de EE. UU. en Moldavia, ve al presidente buscar refugio allí tras perder las elecciones, lo que provoca un ataque contra la embajada.

programme.title: En el infierno
programme.desc: Dentro de la prisión más corrupta de Europa del este, el alcaide pone a los prisioneros unos contra otros en peleas hasta la muerte.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: Secuestro Express
programme.desc: Carla y Martín son una pareja secuestrada por tres hombres que pasan una noche aterradora en Caracas mientras esperan que el padre de Carla pague el rescate.

programme.title: Santitos
programme.desc: Tras la repentina muerte de su hija, Esperanza se resiste a aceptar el hecho. Con su enorme fe en los milagros hace que se le aparezca San Judas Tadeo y le muestre el camino para encontrar lo que ha perdido.

programme.title: Hermosa juventud
programme.desc: Natalia y Carlos, son dos jóvenes enamorados de 20 años, que luchan por sobrevivir en la España actual. Para ganar algo de dinero deciden rodar una película porno amateur. El nacimiento de su hija, Julia, será el principal motor de sus cambios.

programme.title: Feliz año Tijuana
programme.desc: Un encuentro casual con un ex alumno en Tijuana en la víspera de Año Nuevo conduce a una noche emocionalmente turbulenta para un profesor que se encuentra en una encrucijada en su vida.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: La Navidad no tiene precio
programme.desc: Una familia que lucha por salir adelante durante la Depresión espera otra Navidad sin regalos hasta que el padre trae a casa un dólar para gastar en regalos.

programme.title: Miracle on Christmas
programme.desc: Durante las vacaciones de Navidad, María experimenta pruebas emocionales que le hacen cuestionar su fe hasta que llega un visitante y su marido recibe un milagro inesperado.

programme.title: Christmas at Rosemont (LAS)
programme.desc: Atrapada en una tormenta de nieve cinco días antes de Navidad, Lisa, de 23 años de edad, y su nuevo amigo Brad, un snowboarder profesional, se refugian en The Rosemont.

programme.title: En busca del Santa secreto
programme.desc: Un reportero intentará sacar a la luz y resolver sobre un regalo perdido desde hace mucho tiempo que nunca se entregó en Navidad.

programme.title: Navidad vuelve a casa
programme.desc: Al borde de una promoción, una exitosa corredora de bienes raíces, Abbey, se ve obligada a regresar a su ciudad natal para reparar una casa victoriana heredada de su abuela. Al regresar a casa, decide vender la casa y contrata a un padre soltero, Josh.

programme.title: Mi dulce Navidad
programme.desc: La exitosa ejecutiva de marketing Sadie es hija de los dueños de una tienda de chocolate tradicional en un pequeño pueblo de Estados Unidos. Decide pasar la Navidad en su ciudad natal y descubre que sus padres planean vender la tienda.

programme.title: Cupido no funciona
programme.desc: Holly, profesora universitaria, se inscribe en un servicio de citas románticas en línea, pero sospecha que algo anda mal cuando ve que las acciones del chico no coinciden con sus bonitos mensajes.

programme.title: En busca del Santa secreto
programme.desc: Un reportero intentará sacar a la luz y resolver sobre un regalo perdido desde hace mucho tiempo que nunca se entregó en Navidad.

programme.title: Cementerio de mascotas
programme.desc: Para la mayoría de las familias, una mudanza es un nuevo comienzo. Pero para los Creeds será el inicio del fin. Se han mudado al lado del lugar que los niños construyen con sus sueños rotos, el Cementerio de mascotas.

programme.title: La maldición de las hermanas
programme.desc: De los productores de El Aro y Paranoia llega esta escalofriante película, LA MALDICIÓN DE LAS HERMANAS (THE UNINVITED).

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Stephen King: la bala de plata
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica comienza a convocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano / cuidador no está durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: Mientrtas Donna y Vic Trenton luchan para salvar tambaleante su matrimonio, su hijo Tad se hace amigo del adorable San Bernardo de 90 kilos de su mecánico.

programme.title: Cementerio de mascotas
programme.desc: Para la mayoría de las familias, una mudanza es un nuevo comienzo. Pero para los Creeds será el inicio del fin. Se han mudado al lado del lugar que los niños construyen con sus sueños rotos, el Cementerio de mascotas.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Action Point
programme.desc: La estrella de Jackass quiere llevarte a la comedia más loca de tu vida. D.C. y su loca pandilla de inadaptados harán hasta lo imposible cuando un baboso constructor planea cerrar su amado parque.

programme.title: Suburbicon

programme.title: Solteras indisponibles

programme.title: Duplex

programme.title: El mundo está loco, loco

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)

programme.title: Return of the Seven

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven

programme.title: Roman Holiday

programme.title: The Children's Hour: The Children's Hour (1962)

programme.title: The Misfits

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany, so he creates a health spa.

programme.desc: All goes well when Hogan's gang steals Klink's code book from his safe, photographs the contents, and returns it to its proper place. But there's a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film.

programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent "Tiger" in Paris, Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.desc: With camp security raised, Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle some top-secret plans of German fortifications to the Allies. The solution? Make liberal use of Carter's remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler.

programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground, Hogan causes a marital tiff, which, to fix, requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A crime kingpin's son steals from his father by killing a cash courier. On the run, he turns state's evidence and comes under federal protection. Stone and Robbins want him for murder, while his father's hit man just wants him murdered.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido apuñalada más de treinta veces y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. Cerca de su cabeza, la policía descubrió un distintivo botón con hebras de hilo todavía unidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una mujer joven fue descubierto en una granja aislada cerca de Delano, California. Ella no tenía identificación, pero la policía encontró las llaves de un buzón de correo en los bolsillos de sus pantalones.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fotógrafo profesional Charles Rathbun afirma que la modelo Linda Sobek murió durante un encuentro sexual consensuado que salió mal, pero el cadáver de Sobek y las imágenes digitales cuentan una historia más siniestra.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era querida y exitosa, lo cual hace que la brutalidad del crimen sea más difícil de entender.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un residente que hacía tiempo vivía en el pequeño pueblo de Lefroy, Tasmania, fue asesinado fuera de su hogar. El robo pareció ser el motivo, pero sin sospechosos, la investigación se detiene.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos
programme.desc: Dos testigos presenciales pueden tener la llave de la muerte de un miembro de una pandilla de motociclistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de doce años reclama que ha sido secuestrada y abusada sexualmente. Ella contó lo que había pasado con voz calma, sin alteraciones ni emociones, lo que hizo difícil que la policía le creyera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un joven sano muere misteriosamente mientras duerme y las pruebas de toxicología revelan una dosis letal de lidocaína en su sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mark Fair se fue a trabajar y su prometida, Karla Brown, se quedó en casa. Más tarde, la encontró muerta. Durante la autopsia, se volvieron a examinar las marcas de mordeduras en su cuerpo y la odontología forense identificó al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En algún momento durante una fiesta de Navidad en el vecindario, Melissa Brannen, de cinco años, desapareció. Los investigadores recurrieron a la ciencia forense para ayudarlos a ver lo que se perdieron los testigos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una estudiante universitaria desaparece, sus compañeros de clase estaban preocupados por la seguridad de ella y la de ellos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh no se presentó a su clase de música y su esposo Ken la encontró muerta al pie de las escaleras de su casa de Palo Alto. Tras una investigación adicional, el luminol revela evidencia de un asesinato en la cocina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
